content.thinking: Now I have comprehensive findings from all three agents. Let me combine them into an interactive HTML file with Mermaid.js diagrams. I'll create expandable sections for each crate and show data flow between them.

content.text: All three explorations are complete. Now I'll build the interactive HTML visualization.

input.content:
Claw-Code Architecture

Interactive visualization of the Rust workspace: Runtime, Tools, and API crates

System Overview

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': {'primaryColor': '#58a6ff', 'primaryTextColor': '#e6edf3', 'lineColor': '#8b949e', 'secondaryColor': '#161b22', 'tertiaryColor': '#30363d'}}}%% graph TB User["fa:fa-user User Input"] subgraph RT["Runtime Crate"] direction TB CR["ConversationRuntime\n<C: ApiClient, T: ToolExecutor>"] S["Session\n(JSONL persistence)"] CMP["Compaction\n(auto at 100K tokens)"] SP["SystemPromptBuilder"] PM["PermissionPolicy"] HK["HookRunner\n(pre/post tool use)"] MCP["McpToolRegistry\n(MCP bridge)"] CR --> S CR --> CMP CR --> SP CR --> PM CR --> HK CR --> MCP end subgraph TL["Tools Crate"] direction TB GR["GlobalToolRegistry\n(~80 builtin tools)"] TD["execute_tool()\n(match dispatch)"] AG["Agent Spawning\n(OS threads)"] SE["SubagentToolExecutor\n(filtered tools)"] WK["WorkerRegistry"] CRON["CronRegistry"] GR --> TD TD --> AG AG --> SE TD --> WK TD --> CRON end subgraph AP["API Crate"] direction TB PC["ProviderClient\n(Anthropic/xAI/OpenAI)"] SS["MessageStream\n(SSE parser)"] PCACHE["PromptCache\n(FNV fingerprint)"] AUTH["AuthSource\n(key/bearer/OAuth)"] PC --> SS PC --> PCACHE PC --> AUTH end User -->|"text"| CR CR -->|"ApiRequest"| PC PC -->|"StreamEvent"| CR CR -->|"ToolUse"| TD TD -->|"Result<String>"| CR AG -->|"spawns sub-runtime"| CR SE -->|"filtered dispatch"| TD style RT fill:#0d2137,stroke:#58a6ff,color:#e6edf3 style TL fill:#0d2117,stroke:#3fb950,color:#e6edf3 style AP fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff,color:#e6edf3

Conversation Turn Data Flow

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': {'primaryColor': '#58a6ff', 'primaryTextColor': '#e6edf3', 'lineColor': '#8b949e'}}}%% sequenceDiagram participant U as User participant RT as ConversationRuntime participant S as Session participant API as ProviderClient participant T as ToolExecutor participant H as HookRunner U->>RT: run_turn(text) RT->>S: push_user_text() loop max_iterations RT->>API: stream(ApiRequest) API-->>RT: Vec<AssistantEvent> RT->>S: push_message(assistant) alt Has ToolUse blocks loop each ToolUse RT->>H: pre_tool_use_hook() RT->>RT: permission_policy.authorize() RT->>T: execute(name, input) T-->>RT: Result<String> RT->>H: post_tool_use_hook() RT->>S: push_message(tool_result) end else No tools Note over RT: Break loop end end RT->>RT: maybe_auto_compact() RT-->>U: TurnSummary
CORE Conversation Loop

rust/crates/runtime/src/conversation.rs

The central orchestrator. ConversationRuntime<C: ApiClient, T: ToolExecutor> is generic over the API client and tool executor, enabling testing and subagent reuse.

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart TD A["run_turn(user_text)"] --> B["session.push_user_text()"] B --> C{"iteration < max?"} C -->|yes| D["Build ApiRequest\n(system_prompt + messages)"] D --> E["api_client.stream()"] E --> F["build_assistant_message(events)"] F --> G["session.push_message(assistant)"] G --> H{"Has ToolUse?"} H -->|no| I["Break loop"] H -->|yes| J["For each tool:\n1. pre_hook\n2. authorize\n3. execute\n4. post_hook\n5. push result"] J --> C I --> K["maybe_auto_compact()"] K --> L["Return TurnSummary"] C -->|no| L style A fill:#1a3a5c,stroke:#58a6ff style L fill:#1a3a5c,stroke:#58a6ff

ConversationRuntime<C, T>

Configurable via builder: with_max_iterations(), with_auto_compaction_input_tokens_threshold(), with_hook_progress_reporter(), with_session_tracer()

TurnSummary

Output: assistant messages, tool results, TokenUsage, cache events, iteration count

AssistantEvent

Text delta, tool use, usage, prompt cache, message stop — streamed from API

DATA Session Management

rust/crates/runtime/src/session.rs, session_control.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% classDiagram class Session { +String session_id +u32 version +u64 created_at_ms +Vec~ConversationMessage~ messages +Option~SessionCompaction~ compaction +Option~SessionFork~ fork +Option~SessionPersistence~ persistence +new() Session +fork() Session +push_user_text(text) +push_message(msg) +append_persisted_message(msg) } class ConversationMessage { +MessageRole role +Vec~ContentBlock~ blocks +Option~TokenUsage~ usage } class ContentBlock { <> Text ToolUse(id, name, input) ToolResult(tool_use_id, output, is_error) } class MessageRole { <> System User Assistant Tool } Session "1" --> "*" ConversationMessage ConversationMessage "1" --> "*" ContentBlock ConversationMessage --> MessageRole

Persistence

  • Format: JSONL (newline-delimited JSON) with atomic writes
  • Records: session_meta, message, compaction
  • Strategy: Incremental append after each message
  • Rotation: After 256KB, max 3 rotated files
  • Storage: .claw/sessions/{id}.jsonl
PERF Compaction

rust/crates/runtime/src/compact.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart LR A["Token count\n> 100K threshold"] --> B["Identify messages\nto summarize"] B --> C["Extract:\n- tool names\n- user requests\n- key files\n- pending work"] C --> D["Generate\ncontinuation summary"] D --> E["Replace old messages\nwith summary"] E --> F["Preserve last N\nmessages verbatim"] style A fill:#3d2800,stroke:#d29922 style F fill:#1a3a5c,stroke:#58a6ff

CompactionConfig

preserve_recent_messages: 4 (default)
max_estimated_tokens: 10,000

Auto-trigger

Env: CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_INPUT_TOKENS (default 100,000). Checked after each turn.

Token estimation

Rough: chars / 4 + 1

CONFIG Permissions, Hooks, MCP

PermissionMode

ReadOnly | WorkspaceWrite | DangerFullAccess | Prompt | Allow

HookRunner

Executes pre/post tool use shell commands. Can abort, deny, modify input, or provide feedback.

McpToolRegistry

Bridges MCP servers (Stdio/SSE/HTTP/WS/SDK) to the tool surface. Lazy connection via Arc<OnceLock>.

Config Sources

User (~/.claw/) → Project (.claw/) → Local — merged with precedence

FILES Module Map 
rust/crates/runtime/src/
├── lib.rs                 # Public exports
├── conversation.rs        # ConversationRuntime, main loop
├── session.rs             # Session, JSONL persistence
├── compact.rs             # Compaction & summarization
├── session_control.rs     # Session discovery, listing, forking
├── config.rs              # RuntimeConfig, ConfigLoader, MCP configs
├── prompt.rs              # SystemPromptBuilder, ProjectContext
├── hooks.rs               # HookRunner
├── permissions.rs         # PermissionMode, PermissionPolicy
├── permission_enforcer.rs # PermissionEnforcer
├── usage.rs               # TokenUsage, UsageTracker, pricing
├── mcp_tool_bridge.rs     # McpToolRegistry
├── mcp_stdio.rs           # Stdio MCP server management
├── mcp_client.rs          # MCP transport implementations
├── worker_boot.rs         # WorkerRegistry, trust gates
├── file_ops.rs            # read/write/edit/glob/grep
├── bash.rs                # Bash execution
├── sandbox.rs             # Container/sandbox detection
├── remote.rs              # Upstream proxy sessions
├── bootstrap.rs           # Startup phases
├── policy_engine.rs       # Lane blocking policy
├── task_*.rs              # Task management & cron
└── plugin_lifecycle.rs    # Plugin state machine
CORE Tool Dispatch

rust/crates/tools/src/lib.rs (74KB monolithic)

All ~80 tools dispatched through a single match statement in execute_tool_with_enforcer().

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart TD A["execute_tool(name, input)"] --> B["execute_tool_with_enforcer(enforcer, name, input)"] B --> C{"match name"} C -->|"bash"| D["run_bash(BashCommandInput)"] C -->|"read_file"| E["run_read_file(ReadFileInput)"] C -->|"write_file"| F["run_write_file(WriteFileInput)"] C -->|"edit_file"| G["run_edit_file(EditFileInput)"] C -->|"Agent"| H["run_agent(AgentInput)"] C -->|"glob_search"| I["run_glob_search()"] C -->|"grep_search"| J["run_grep_search()"] C -->|"LSP"| K["run_lsp()"] C -->|"Worker*"| L["Worker registry ops"] C -->|"Cron*"| M["Cron registry ops"] C -->|"..."| N["~70 more tools"] style A fill:#0d3117,stroke:#3fb950 style C fill:#1a2e1a,stroke:#3fb950

GlobalToolRegistry

Manages builtin + plugin + runtime tools. Methods: definitions(), search(), execute()

ToolSpec

name, description, input_schema (JSON Schema), required_permission: PermissionMode

Permission Mapping

ReadOnly: read/glob/grep | WorkspaceWrite: write/edit | DangerFullAccess: bash

AGENT Agent Spawning & Subagent System

rust/crates/tools/src/lib.rs (run_agent, execute_agent_with_spawn, spawn_agent_job)

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart TD A["run_agent(AgentInput)"] --> B["execute_agent_with_spawn()"] B --> C["Generate agent_id\nCreate manifest files"] C --> D["Determine allowed_tools\nfrom subagent_type"] D --> E["spawn_agent_job()\n(OS thread)"] E --> F["run_agent_job()"] F --> G["Build SubagentToolExecutor\n(filtered tool set)"] G --> H["Build ConversationRuntime\n<ProviderRuntimeClient,\nSubagentToolExecutor>"] H --> I["runtime.run_turn(prompt)\nmax 32 iterations"] I --> J["Persist terminal state\n(completed/failed)"] style A fill:#0d3117,stroke:#3fb950 style E fill:#3d2800,stroke:#d29922 style H fill:#0d2137,stroke:#58a6ff

Subagent Types → Allowed Tools

Explore

read_file, glob_search, grep_search, WebFetch, WebSearch, Skill

Plan

Explore tools + TodoWrite, SendUserMessage

Verification

Plan tools + bash, PowerShell

General Purpose (default)

All available tools

Isolation Layers

  • Tool whitelisting: SubagentToolExecutor.allowed_tools: BTreeSet<String>
  • Permission enforcement: PermissionEnforcer gates each call
  • Thread isolation: Dedicated OS thread per agent with panic catch
  • Max iterations: 32 per agent turn (vs unbounded for main runtime)
REGISTRY Workers, Teams, Cron
%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% stateDiagram-v2 direction LR [*] --> Spawning : WorkerCreate Spawning --> TrustRequired TrustRequired --> ReadyForPrompt : TrustResolved ReadyForPrompt --> Running : PromptDelivered Running --> Finished : Success Running --> Failed : Error

WorkerRegistry

In-memory registry of background shell worker processes. Tracks trust status, prompt delivery, lifecycle events.

TeamRegistry

Create/delete teams with task_ids. Thread-safe: Arc<Mutex<HashMap>>

CronRegistry

Cron entries: schedule, prompt, enabled, run_count, last_run_at. CRUD + disable + record_run.

LIST All Tools (~80)

File Operations

bash, read_file, write_file, edit_file, glob_search, grep_search

Agents & Tasks

Agent, TaskCreate, TaskGet, TaskList, TaskStop, TaskUpdate, TaskOutput

Workers

WorkerCreate, WorkerGet, WorkerObserve, WorkerResolveTrust, WorkerAwaitReady, WorkerSendPrompt, WorkerRestart, WorkerTerminate

Scheduling

CronCreate, CronDelete, CronList, TeamCreate, TeamDelete

Code Intelligence

LSP (goToDefinition, findReferences, hover, workspaceSymbol, etc.)

MCP & External

ListMcpResources, ReadMcpResource, McpAuth, MCP, RemoteTrigger

Web

WebFetch, WebSearch

IDE/UI

TodoWrite, StructuredOutput, NotebookEdit, REPL, PowerShell, AskUserQuestion

Planning & Config

EnterPlanMode, ExitPlanMode, Config, Sleep, ToolSearch, Skill

CORE Provider Architecture

rust/crates/api/src/providers/mod.rs, client.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart TD A["detect_provider_kind(model)"] --> B{"Model prefix?"} B -->|"claude*"| C["Anthropic"] B -->|"grok*"| D["xAI"] B -->|other| E{"Env vars?"} E -->|"ANTHROPIC_API_KEY"| C E -->|"XAI_API_KEY"| D E -->|"OPENAI_API_KEY"| F["OpenAI"] E -->|default| C C --> G["AnthropicClient"] D --> H["OpenAiCompatClient"] F --> H G --> I["ProviderClient::Anthropic"] H --> J["ProviderClient::Xai / ::OpenAi"] style A fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff style G fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff style H fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff

Provider trait

send_message() and stream_message() with associated Stream type

ProviderClient enum

Anthropic(AnthropicClient) | Xai(OpenAiCompatClient) | OpenAi(OpenAiCompatClient)

Model Aliases

"opus" → claude-opus-4-6 | "sonnet" → claude-sonnet-4-6 | "haiku" → claude-haiku-4-5

STREAM Streaming & SSE Parsing

rust/crates/api/src/sse.rs, providers/anthropic.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% sequenceDiagram participant H as HTTP Response participant P as SseParser participant Q as VecDeque<StreamEvent> participant C as Consumer loop chunks arrive H->>P: raw bytes P->>P: Buffer until \\n\\n delimiter P->>P: Parse event type + JSON data P->>Q: Enqueue StreamEvent(s) end C->>Q: next_event() Q-->>C: StreamEvent Note over C: MessageStart, ContentBlockDelta,
ContentBlockStop, MessageStop

StreamEvent Variants

MessageStart

Initial metadata (model, id, role)

ContentBlockDelta

TextDelta | InputJsonDelta | ThinkingDelta | SignatureDelta

MessageDelta

Usage updates and stop_reason

MessageStop

Stream complete. Triggers cache usage recording.

CACHE Prompt Cache

rust/crates/api/src/prompt_cache.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% flowchart TD A["Incoming Request"] --> B["Compute FNV-1a fingerprints\n(model, system, tools, messages)"] B --> C{"Completion\ncache hit?"} C -->|"hit + fresh TTL"| D["Return cached\nMessageResponse"] C -->|miss| E["Call API"] E --> F["Record response\nin cache"] F --> G["Detect cache break"] G --> H{"Fingerprint\nchanged?"} H -->|yes| I["Expected invalidation\n(model/prompt/tools changed)"] H -->|no| J{"Token drop\n> 2000?"} J -->|yes| K["Unexpected cache break\n(possible TTL expiry)"] J -->|no| L["Cache healthy"] style A fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff style D fill:#0d3117,stroke:#3fb950 style K fill:#3d1500,stroke:#f85149

PromptCache

Arc<Mutex<PromptCacheInner>>. Methods: lookup_completion(), record_response(), record_usage()

PromptCacheStats

Tracks: hits/misses/writes, expected/unexpected invalidations, creation/read token totals

Storage

$CLAUDE_CONFIG_HOME/cache/prompt-cache/<session-id>/completions/v1-<hash>.json

TTLs

Completions: 30s | Prompts: 5 minutes

AUTH Authentication & Retry

AuthSource

None | ApiKey(String) | BearerToken(String) | ApiKeyAndBearer{...}

Loading Strategy

1. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env → 2. ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN env → 3. Saved OAuth from disk → 4. Error

Retry / Backoff

Exponential: 200ms → 2s max, 3 attempts. Retryable: 408, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504

ApiError

MissingCredentials | ExpiredOAuthToken | Auth | Http | Api{status, retryable} | RetriesExhausted

TYPES Request / Response Types

rust/crates/api/src/types.rs

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark'}}%% classDiagram class MessageRequest { +String model +u32 max_tokens +Vec~InputMessage~ messages +Option~String~ system +Option~Vec~ToolDefinition~~ tools +Option~ToolChoice~ tool_choice +bool stream } class InputMessage { +String role +Vec~InputContentBlock~ content } class InputContentBlock { <> Text ToolUse(id, name, input) ToolResult(tool_use_id, content, is_error) } class MessageResponse { +String id +String role +Vec~OutputContentBlock~ content +String model +Option~String~ stop_reason +Usage usage } class OutputContentBlock { <> Text ToolUse(id, name, input) Thinking(thinking, signature) RedactedThinking } class Usage { +u32 input_tokens +u32 cache_creation_input_tokens +u32 cache_read_input_tokens +u32 output_tokens } MessageRequest "1" --> "*" InputMessage InputMessage "1" --> "*" InputContentBlock MessageResponse "1" --> "*" OutputContentBlock MessageResponse --> Usage
FILES Module Map 
rust/crates/api/src/
├── lib.rs              # Public exports
├── types.rs            # MessageRequest/Response, StreamEvent, Usage
├── client.rs           # ProviderClient enum, factory routing
├── error.rs            # ApiError variants, retryability
├── sse.rs              # SSE frame parser (Anthropic format)
├── prompt_cache.rs     # Fingerprinting, completion cache, break detection
└── providers/
    ├── mod.rs          # Provider trait, detection, model registry
    ├── anthropic.rs    # AnthropicClient, MessageStream, auth
    └── openai_compat.rs # OpenAiCompatClient, format translation

Cross-Crate Dependencies

%%{init: {'theme': 'dark', 'themeVariables': {'primaryColor': '#58a6ff', 'lineColor': '#8b949e'}}}%% graph LR subgraph tools["Tools Crate"] GR["GlobalToolRegistry"] AG["Agent spawning"] end subgraph runtime["Runtime Crate"] CR["ConversationRuntime"] S["Session"] PM["Permissions"] CFG["Config"] MCP["MCP Bridge"] USG["Usage/Pricing"] end subgraph api["API Crate"] PC["ProviderClient"] ST["Streaming"] PCACHE["PromptCache"] AUTH["AuthSource"] end subgraph telemetry["Telemetry Crate"] TR["SessionTracer"] AN["AnalyticsEvent"] end tools -->|"implements ToolExecutor"| runtime tools -->|"uses ProviderRuntimeClient"| api AG -->|"spawns ConversationRuntime"| runtime runtime -->|"calls ApiClient.stream()"| api runtime -->|"UsageTracker pricing"| api api -->|"pricing_for_model()"| runtime api -->|"SessionTracer events"| telemetry api -->|"OAuth credentials"| runtime style tools fill:#0d3117,stroke:#3fb950,color:#e6edf3 style runtime fill:#0d2137,stroke:#58a6ff,color:#e6edf3 style api fill:#1a0d2e,stroke:#d2a8ff,color:#e6edf3 style telemetry fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#d29922,color:#e6edf3
